text.title: Deliverability Incident Runbook Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping observable signals to containment action; leaves cite a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Any threshold (complaint > 0.1, bounce > 5, unsub > 2× baseline) tripped?

branch.question: Can the incident be isolated to a single segment / template?

conclusion.verdict: action=escalate; segment isolation needs human investigator

branch.question: Does DKIM/SPF/DMARC pass for the sending domain?

conclusion.verdict: action=throttle entire domain + escalate; auth fix is precondition

branch.question: Complaint rate vs hard cap (0.3% = Gmail reputation-killer)?

conclusion.verdict: action=throttle to 30%; warmup_curve over next 3 sends

text.example: tripped=true → isolated=true → auth=pass → complaint_rate=0.18 < 0.3 → mandatory-warmup-post-recovery → throttle to 30% with warmup_curve.
